content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a page from a datasheet for the TLV757P. - **Header:** Texas Instruments logo, website, part number (TLV757P), document number (SBVS322C), date (OCTOBER 2017 – REVISED MARCH 2024). - **Section Title:** "4 Pin Configuration and Functions" - **Figure 4-1:** A diagram of a 5-pin package (DBV). - **Figure 4-1 Caption:** "Figure 4-1. DBV Package, 5-Pin SOT-23 (Top View)" - **Figure 4-2:** A diagram of a 5-pin package (DYD) with an exposed thermal pad. - **Figure 4-2 Caption:** "Figure 4-2. DYD Package, 5-Pin SOT-23 With Exposed Thermal Pad (Top View)" - **Figure 4-3:** A diagram of a 6-pin package (DRV) with an exposed thermal pad. - **Figure 4-3 Caption:** "Figure 4-3. DRV Package, 6-Pin WSON With Exposed Thermal Pad (Top View)" - **Table 4-1:** "Pin Functions" table. - **Table Content:** Columns for NAME, PIN (DBV, DYD, DRV), TYPE, and DESCRIPTION. - **Footnote (1):** Explains the nominal input and output capacitance requirements. - **Footer:** Copyright information, Product Folder Links, Submit Document Feedback, page number. **2. Extract content:** * **Header:** * Texas Instruments logo and text. * TLV757P * SBVS322C – OCTOBER 2017 – REVISED MARCH 2024 * **Title:** 4 Pin Configuration and Functions * **Figure 4-1:** * Diagram showing pins: IN, GND, EN on the left; 1, 2, 3; 4, 5; OUT, NC on the right. * Label: "Not to scale" * **Figure 4-1 Caption:** Figure 4-1. DBV Package, 5-Pin SOT-23 (Top View) * **Figure 4-2:** * Diagram showing pins: IN, GND, EN on the left; 1, 2, 3; 4, 5; OUT, NC on the right. Center has "Thermal Pad". * Label: "Not to scale" * **Figure 4-2 Caption:** Figure 4-2. DYD Package, 5-Pin SOT-23 With Exposed Thermal Pad (Top View) * **Figure 4-3:** * Diagram showing pins: OUT, NC, GND on the left; 1, 2, 3; 4, 5, 6; IN, NC, EN on the right. Center has "Thermal Pad". * Label: "Not to scale" * **Figure 4-3 Caption:** Figure 4-3. DRV Package, 6-Pin WSON With Exposed Thermal Pad (Top View) * **Table 4-1:** * Title: Table 4-1. Pin Functions * Columns: NAME, PIN (DBV, DYD, DRV), TYPE, DESCRIPTION * Rows: * EN | 3 | 3 | 4 | I | Enable pin. Drive EN greater than $V_{HI}$ to turn on the regulator. Drive EN less than $V_{LO}$ to place the LDO into shutdown mode. * GND | 2 | 2 | 3 | — | Ground pin. * IN | 1 | 1 | 6 | I | Input pin. A capacitor with a value of $1\mu F$ or larger is required from this pin to ground.$^{(1)}$ See the Input and Output Capacitor Selection section for more information. * NC | 4 | 4 | 2, 5 | — | No internal connection. * OUT | 5 | 5 | 1 | O | Regulated output voltage pin. A capacitor with a value of $1\mu F$ or larger is required from this pin to ground.$^{(1)}$ See the Input and Output Capacitor Selection section for more information. * Thermal pad | — | Pad | Pad | — | Connect the thermal pad to a large-area ground plane. The thermal pad is internally connected to GND. * **Footnote (1):** Make sure the nominal input and output capacitance are greater than $0.47\mu F$. Throughout this document the nominal derating on these capacitors is 50%. Make sure that the effective capacitance at the pin is greater than $0.47\mu F$. * **Footer:** * Copyright © 2024 Texas Instruments Incorporated * Submit Document Feedback * 3 * Product Folder Links: TLV757P **3. Format as JSON:** Construct the JSON structure based on the extracted content. ```json [{"bbox": [85, 34, 248, 80], "category": "header", "text": "Texas Instruments\nwww.ti.com"}, {"bbox": [848, 56, 913, 68], "category": "header", "text": "TLV757P"}, {"bbox": [616, 68, 913, 80], "category": "header", "text": "SBVS322C – OCTOBER 2017 – REVISED MARCH 2024"}, {"bbox": [88, 96, 414, 114], "category": "title", "text": "4 Pin Configuration and Functions"}, {"bbox": [169, 128, 421, 271], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [99, 275, 492, 291], "category": "figure_caption", "text": "Figure 4-1. DBV Package, 5-Pin SOT-23 (Top View)"}, {"bbox": [588, 128, 816, 258], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [529, 260, 876, 291], "category": "figure_caption", "text": "Figure 4-2. DYD Package, 5-Pin SOT-23 With Exposed Thermal Pad (Top View)"}, {"bbox": [402, 299, 595, 434], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [198, 438, 800, 454], "category": "figure_caption", "text": "Figure 4-3. DRV Package, 6-Pin WSON With Exposed Thermal Pad (Top View)"}, {"bbox": [404, 469, 595, 483], "category": "table_caption", "text": "Table 4-1. Pin Functions"}, {"bbox": [89, 483, 906, 698], "category": "table", "text": "
PINTYPEDESCRIPTION
NAMEDBVDYDDRV
EN334IEnable pin. Drive EN greater than \\(V_{HI}\\) to turn on the regulator. Drive EN less than \\(V_{LO}\\) to place the LDO into shutdown mode.
GND223—Ground pin.
IN116IInput pin. A capacitor with a value of \\(1\\mu F\\) or larger is required from this pin to ground.(1) See the Input and Output Capacitor Selection section for more information.
NC442, 5—No internal connection.
OUT551ORegulated output voltage pin. A capacitor with a value of \\(1\\mu F\\) or larger is required from this pin to ground.(1) See the Input and Output Capacitor Selection section for more information.
Thermal pad—PadPad—Connect the thermal pad to a large-area ground plane. The thermal pad is internally connected to GND.
"}, {"bbox": [89, 707, 906, 733], "category": "text", "text": "(1) Make sure the nominal input and output capacitance are greater than $0.47\\mu F$. Throughout this document the nominal derating on these capacitors is 50%. Make sure that the effective capacitance at the pin is greater than $0.47\\mu F$."}, {"bbox": [85, 935, 342, 947], "category": "footer", "text": "Copyright © 2024 Texas Instruments Incorporated"}, {"bbox": [703, 936, 872, 948], "category": "footer", "text": "Submit Document Feedback"}, {"bbox": [902, 936, 913, 947], "category": "footer", "text": "3"}, {"bbox": [407, 952, 592, 965], "category": "footer", "text": "Product Folder Links: TLV757P"}] ```
